title: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Process Supervision

defines.name: DecEx-RAG
defines.definition: A process-supervised Agentic RAG framework that models retrieval-augmented generation as a Markov Decision Process with decision-making and execution stages to enable fine-grained optimization.

problem: Outcome-supervised Agentic RAG suffers from inefficient exploration, sparse rewards, and weak step-level feedback for optimizing reasoning and retrieval.
